member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AdminController.GetAllUsers(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of all users in the system.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AdminController.GetUserById(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves detailed information for any user by their ID.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AdminController.DeactivateUser(System.String)
member.summary: Soft delete — marks user as deactivated.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AdminController.ActivateUser(System.String)
member.summary: Re-activate a user account.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AuthController.LoginAsync(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Account.AuthenticationRequest)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AuthController.RegisterAsync(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Account.RegisterRequest)
member.summary: Registers a new user in the system.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AuthController.RefreshAsync(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Account.RefreshTokenRequest)
member.summary: Refreshes an expired JWT token using a valid refresh token.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AuthController.LogoutAsync(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Account.LogoutRequest)
member.summary: Revokes the user's current session and invalidates the refresh token.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AuthController.ChangePassword(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Account.ChangePasswordRequest)
member.summary: Changes the password for the authenticated user.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AuthController.DeleteAccount(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Account.DeleteAccountRequest)
member.summary: Permanently deletes the user account.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AuthController.ConfirmEmailAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Confirms the user's email address using a verification code.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AuthController.ForgotPassword(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Account.ForgotPasswordRequest)
member.summary: Sends a password reset email to the specified address.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AuthController.ResetPassword(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Account.ResetPasswordRequest)
member.summary: Resets the user's password using a reset token.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AuthController.GetCurrentUser
member.summary: Returns the current authenticated user's profile extracted from the JWT token.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AuthController.VerifyToken(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Account.VerifyTokenRequest)
member.summary: Validates a JWT token via REST. Returns validity status, user id and roles.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.CampaignsController.GetCampaigns(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of global active campaigns and promotions.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.CartController.GetCart
member.summary: Retrieves the current user's basket/cart.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.CartController.AddToCart(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Order.AddCartItemRequest)
member.summary: Adds a product to the user's basket.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.CartController.UpdateItem(System.String,CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Order.UpdateCartItemRequest)
member.summary: Updates the quantity of an item in the basket.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.CartController.RemoveItem(System.String)
member.summary: Removes an item from the basket.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.CartController.ClearCart
member.summary: Clears all items from the basket.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.CartController.Checkout(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Order.CheckoutRequest)
member.summary: Converts the current basket into a pending order. Requires Idempotency-Key.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.HomeController.GetDiscover
member.summary: Retrieves the landing page discovery data (campaigns, nearby restaurants, etc.).

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.InternalOrdersController.PaymentCallback(System.String,CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Order.InternalPaymentCallbackRequest)
member.summary: Recieves payment status updates (e.g. HOLD_CONFIRMED) from the Payment Service. Requires X-Internal-Secret header.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.InternalUsersController.GetUserById(System.String)
member.summary: Fetch basic user profile by ID. Used by Order and Payment services.
Retrieves non-sensitive internal user data (e.g. for Order Service). Requires X-Internal-Secret header.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.InternalUsersController.BulkLookup(CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UserLookupRequest)
member.summary: Bulk fetch multiple users by a list of IDs.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.InternalUsersController.GetUserByEmail(System.String)
member.summary: Look up a user by email address. Used by Gateway/Auth for credential verification.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.InternalVendorsController.BulkLookup(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Vendor.VendorLookupRequest)
member.summary: Bulk fetch vendor details (name, image_url) by IDs. Used by Gateway/BFF for composition.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.MetaController.Info
member.summary: Retrieves system information and version details.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.OrdersController.GetMyOrders(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves the current user's order history with pagination and status filtering.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.OrdersController.GetOrder(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves detailed information about a specific order.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.OrdersController.CancelOrder(System.String)
member.summary: Cancels a pending or held order.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.OrdersController.Reorder(System.String)
member.summary: Re-populates the basket with items from a previous order.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.OrdersController.RequestRefund(System.String)
member.summary: Initiates a refund request for a paid or delivered order.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.PaymentsController.InitializePayment(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Payment.PaymentInitRequest)
member.summary: Initialize a payment and get the iyzico Checkout Form.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.PaymentsController.ProcessCallback(System.String,CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Payment.PaymentCallbackRequest)
member.summary: Callback called after user completes the iyzico hosted form.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.PaymentsController.CapturePayment(System.String,CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Payment.PaymentCaptureRequest)
member.summary: Capture funds for an authorized payment.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.PaymentsController.CancelPayment(System.String,CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Payment.PaymentCancelRequest)
member.summary: Cancel (Void or Refund) a payment.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.PaymentsController.GetPayment(System.String)
member.summary: Get payment details by ID.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.PaymentsController.GetPayments(System.String)
member.summary: Get all payments (optionally filtered by order).

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.RestaurantOrdersController.GetRestaurantOrders(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves paginated orders belonging to the restaurant.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.RestaurantOrdersController.ConfirmOrder(System.String)
member.summary: Confirms a held order, triggering the payment capture process.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.RestaurantOrdersController.RejectOrder(System.String)
member.summary: Rejects a held order, triggering a payment hold release.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.RestaurantOrdersController.UpdateStatus(System.String,CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Order.UpdateOrderStatusRequest)
member.summary: Manually updates the order status (e.g. PREPARING, DELIVERED).

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.SearchController.Search(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Performs a global search across restaurants and products.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UsersController.GetProfile
member.summary: Get the authenticated user's own profile.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UsersController.UpdateProfile(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.User.UserUpdateProfileRequest)
member.summary: Update the authenticated user's own profile (name, phone only).

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UsersController.GetAddresses
member.summary: List all saved addresses of the authenticated user.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UsersController.CreateAddress(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.User.CreateAddressRequest)
member.summary: Add a new delivery address.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UsersController.UpdateAddress(System.String,CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.User.CreateAddressRequest)
member.summary: Update an existing delivery address.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UsersController.DeleteAddress(System.String)
member.summary: Remove a delivery address.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UsersController.SetCurrentAddress(System.String)
member.summary: Set an address as the current/default delivery address.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UsersController.GetFavorites(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get favorites with details aggregated from User and Restaurant services.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UsersController.AddFavorite(System.String)
member.summary: Add a vendor to favorites.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UsersController.RemoveFavorite(System.String)
member.summary: Remove a vendor from favorites.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.VendorsController.GetVendors(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of all restaurants/vendors.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.VendorsController.GetVendor(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves detailed profile and information for a specific restaurant.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.VendorsController.GetNearbyVendors(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Lists restaurants within a specific geographic radius.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.VendorsController.GetVendorMenu(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the full menu structure (sections and products) for a restaurant.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.VendorsController.CreateVendor(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Vendor.CreateVendorDto)
member.summary: Registers a new restaurant in the system.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.VendorsController.UpdateVendor(System.String,CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Vendor.UpdateVendorDto)
member.summary: Updates the core profile details of a restaurant.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.VendorsController.UpdateVendorStatus(System.String,CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Vendor.UpdateStatusDto)
member.summary: Updates the operational status (Active/Inactive) of a restaurant.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.VendorsController.GetVendorReviews(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves customer reviews and ratings for a restaurant.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.VendorsController.GetVendorCampaigns(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves active promotions and campaigns for a restaurant.

member.summary: Holder for reflection information generated from Protos/auth.proto

member.summary: Service descriptor

member.name: T:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Grpc.AuthService.AuthServiceBase
member.summary: Base class for server-side implementations of AuthService

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Grpc.AuthService.BindService(CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Grpc.AuthService.AuthServiceBase)
member.summary: Creates service definition that can be registered with a server
member.param: An object implementing the server-side handling logic.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Grpc.AuthService.BindService(Grpc.Core.ServiceBinderBase,CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Grpc.AuthService.AuthServiceBase)
member.summary: Register service method with a service binder with or without implementation. Useful when customizing the service binding logic. Note: this method is part of an experimental API that can change or be removed without any prior notice.
member.param: Service methods will be bound by calling AddMethod on this object.
An object implementing the server-side handling logic.
